channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: BeSafe-Bench: Unveiling Behavioral Safety Risks of Situated Agents in Functional Environments
item.description: arXiv:2603.25747v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rapid evolution of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) has enabled agents to perform complex digital and physical tasks, yet their deployment as autonomous decision-makers introduces substantial unintentional behavioral safety risks. However, the absen...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, instruction, reasoning, arxiv, multimodal | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Semi-Automated Knowledge Engineering and Process Mapping for Total Airport Management
item.description: arXiv:2603.26076v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Documentation of airport operations is inherently complex due to extensive technical terminology, rigorous regulations, proprietary regional information, and fragmented communication across multiple stakeholders. The resulting data silos and semantic ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context window, library, arxiv, large language model, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: openlit - Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.
item.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> vector, framework, platform, prompt, LLM | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, tool, context, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Incorporating contextual information into KGWAS for interpretable GWAS discovery
item.description: arXiv:2603.25855v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Genome-Wide Association Studies (GWAS) identify associations between genetic variants and disease; however, moving beyond associations to causal mechanisms is critical for therapeutic target prioritization. The recently proposed Knowledge Graph GWAS (...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, arxiv, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: parlant - The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.
item.description: The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
